title: Origins: Murder Drones
description: A Datapack which adds Muder Drone Characters to the Origins Mod.
body:
![Notice box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64f5cf10fe86170a7f7bde26f5d28c4aae0aae74.png)

# 🌟 Origins: Murder Drones

This datapack expands the gameplay of the Origins Mod by adding new unique Origins with special abilities and playstyles.
Every Origin comes with its own strengths, weaknesses, and powers, offering fresh challenges and new ways to experience Minecraft.
Choose wisely — your Origin shapes your entire adventure!

### ✨ Features:

- New Origins with custom abilities

- Passive and active powers

- Balanced for survival gameplay

- Works in both Singleplayer and Multiplayer



---

### 📦 Installation Guide

*Requirements*:

- Minecraft Java Edition

- Fabric (or Quilt) Modloader

- Origins Mod

---

### 📀 Step-by-Step Installation:

*1) Install Fabric*

Download the Fabric Installer:
https://fabricmc.net/use/

Run the installer and install Fabric for your Minecraft version.

Launch Minecraft once to set up the Fabric environment.


*2) Add Required Mods*

Download and place the required mods into your mods folder:

Origins: https://modrinth.com/mod/origins

Move the [.jar] files to:

> .minecraft/mods/


*3) Add the Datapack*

Do not unzip the datapack.

Open your world folder:


[.minecraft/saves/YOUR_WORLD/datapacks/]

Place the datapack [.zip] file inside.


*4) Load the Datapack*

- Enter your world.

- If the datapack does not load automatically, run:  [/reload]

-or enable the datapack from world settings.


---

# ✅ Done!

You can now select the new Origins when creating your character and start your adventure 🎮
